titleStmt.title: SII 9.229: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 229. (A.R. No. 699 of 1919.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE HANUMARADONE AT RAMADURGA, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 8th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva, cyclic year Ānanda, Jyēshṭha, śu. 3, Śukravāra corresponding to A.D. 1134 April 19 Saturday, not Friday, as stated. The month was adhika. During the rule of Garuḍaseṭṭi of Saudore, Gōnaya-Nāyaka consecrated the god Kalidēva of Māchikavvanabeṭṭa and made a gift of (the land called ?) Henukanahāḷu. Garuḍaseṭṭi consecrated the goddess Bhairavabhagavatī and made a gift of 4 mattars of land, an oil-mill, a house and a flower garden for the service of the god Kalidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu bhū
lōkamallavarṣada 8 neya
yānaṁdasaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha suddha
tadige sukravāradaṁdu pirivura
Iṁdavālaya saudoregaṁgoṁḍagaruḍi
seṭṭiyara rājyapravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkasthāyiyāgi saluttamiralu
gōnayanāyaka mācikavvana beṭṭada
kalidēvara pratiṣṭemāḍi henukana
hāḷa mallipaṁḍitarge dhārāpūrvakaṁ
māḍi koḍalu śrīmatu sau
dore garuḍaseṭṭiyaru bhairavabhagava
tiya pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi śrīkalidē vargge
pūjepunaskārakkaṁ Ūriṁdōṇiyiṁ
baḍagalu Āṟuvattu gēṇa ghaḷeyiṁ
biṭṭa mattaru 4 gāṇa 2 nivēśaṇa 1
pūdōṁṭa 1 Iṁtivu modalāgi biṭṭa
dēvara pratiṣṭheyinitakkaṁ malli
paṁḍita(ra)rācāryyareṁdu vyatī
pātanimittavāgi dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ māḍi koṭṭa dharmmācaṁdrārkasthāyi .
Digital edition of SII 9.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
